## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site traffic shows significant growth: 40% increase in clicks, 7.7% increase in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [LLM search visibility has surged since July 21st, particularly for ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Blog performance saw a 67% increase in non-branded clicks despite a decrease in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Automated image generation has been implemented in the content pipeline, pending size optimization](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Topics

### Overall Site Performance

  - [40% increase in clicks and 7.7% increase in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [CTR improved significantly](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Average position jumped 4.4 positions](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Consistent growth with expected weekend declines](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Site described as on an "unstoppable trajectory"](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Blog Performance

  - [Lower fluctuations in past two weeks, followed by a big jump this week](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [67% increase in non-branded clicks over the previous week](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Decrease in impressions, but not concerning due to increased clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Performance volatility attributed partly to LLM search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### LLM Search Visibility

  - [Massive increase since July 21st](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini leading in referrals](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Content structure (parsed pieces, headers) well-suited for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Team to investigate specific queries and prompts driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [No single piece driving massive gains; steady overall growth](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Pillar pieces continue to perform well](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Increased content volume contributing to overall reach](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Team to analyze high-performing pieces for potential updates/refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [New category added by Mike for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Automated image generation implemented in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Image size optimization needed to prevent site speed issues](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dive deeper into specific blog post performance](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Analyze Scrunch data for LLM prompts resulting in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Investigate high-performing pieces for potential updates/refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Optimize automated image generation for file size](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Continue monitoring LLM search visibility and its impact on overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/tM4XkvLsRhaF_i7tu1nzKmXsTGrZrb_J?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
